name: Reduced Fat Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a mixer bowl, combine all ingredients except the pastry shell; mix well.
3. Pour into the prepared pastry shell.
4. Bake for 15 minutes at 425°F.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F and bake for an additional 25 to 30 minutes, or until a knife inserted 1 inch from the edges comes out clean.
6. Cool. Garnish as desired.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
